text: btw if you havent set your {codex | claude | gemini | devin} automations to autoresearch how to improve your seo/aeo every week you are really truly missing out on free, should-be-commoditizing-but-weirdly-untapped alpha
title: AI-Powered SEO/AEO Automation as Untapped Competitive Advantage
summary: A researcher highlights that using AI coding assistants and agents to automatically research and improve search engine optimization and AI-engine optimization weekly is a widely available but underutilized practice that can provide significant competitive advantage.
why_it_matters: This demonstrates a practical application of AI agents for business optimization, showing how engineers can leverage existing LLM tools (Claude, Gemini, Devin, etc.) for automated competitive analysis and SEO/AEO improvements—a workflow pattern relevant to building AI-driven automation systems.
